Events & Partnerships Manager

Kirsten Draka

I've spent the last 4+ years at the intersection of creativity and execution — building partnerships, producing events, and doing the work that turns a great idea into something real. From negotiating brand deals with influencers and celebrities to flying out of state to produce activations that sell out and generate $60K in a single day, I'm at my best when I'm building something that actually connects with people. I love the creative side and the logistics side equally, and the best part is seeing the smiles on everyone's faces when it all comes together.

01 — Brand Partnerships

Collaborations that
mean something

Featured Partnership

Bethany Hamilton × Carly Jean Los Angeles

I negotiated and produced a full brand collaboration with world-renowned surfer and activist Bethany Hamilton — traveling to Hawaii to coordinate an on-location shoot, conduct a brand interview, and design a giveback structure with her non-profit, Beautifully Flawed. A portion of all proceeds from the collection were donated directly to the foundation.

From contract negotiation to creative direction on location to the charitable partnership model — I led every touchpoint of this campaign end to end.

Partnership Negotiation On-Location Shoot Non-Profit Giveback Campaign Strategy
02 — Events

Experiences designed
from the ground up

Influencer Activation

Influencer Dinners & Meetups

Curated intimate gatherings for CJLA's influencer community — venue sourcing, invite strategy, gifting, and on-site hosting. Built genuine brand loyalty through connection.

Out-of-State Conference

Share the Arrows — Dallas, TX

Sponsored Allie Beth Stuckey's Share the Arrows conference in Dallas two years in a row — coordinating the brand presence, influencer dinner, and community meetup all in one out-of-state activation.

In-State Sales Event

Pop-Up Sales — $60K+

Produced high-volume in-state pop-up sales events selling discounted pieces, drawing hundreds of attendees and generating over $60,000 in a single event. Handled venue, staffing, and day-of operations.

Out-of-State Events

Traveled out of state to produce brand activations — coordinating logistics, talent, and on-site execution from start to finish.
